pdf_options.title: Izinketho zokukhipha umbhalo ku-PDF

pdf_options.keep_generated_pdf_label: Gcina i-PDF edaliwe yamakhasi akhethiwe ngemva kokucubungula

route_choice.title: Khetha indlela yokukhipha

ocr_activation_disclosure.title: Buyekeza ukuvulwa kwe-Google OCR
ocr_activation_disclosure.intro: toT isebenzisa izinsiza ze-Google ze-OCR. Uma uqhubeka, isiphequluli sakho sizovuleka ukuze ugunyaze le app.
ocr_activation_disclosure.selected_files: Kuthunyelwa ku-Google kuphela amafayela owakhethayo e-OCR.
ocr_activation_disclosure.local_storage: Le app igcina imininingwane ye-Google OAuth ye-OCR ephethwe yi-app kanye nesimo sethokheni ye-Google sendawo kulesi senzakalo se-app.
ocr_activation_disclosure.remote_cleanup: Ngemva kokuthekelisa, i-app izama ukususa idokhumenti yesikhashana ye-Google ku-Google Drive yakho.
ocr_activation_disclosure.disconnect: Kamuva ungakwazi ukunqamula lokhu kuxhumana kokuthi Izintandokazi > Nqamula i-Google OCR.

apply_modal.title: Sebenzisa umbhalo okhishiwe
apply_modal.message: Khetha ukuthi uzowusebenzisa kanjani umbhalo okhishiwe.

single_file_heavy.case_a_message: I-PDF ephelele idlula umkhawulo womhlinzeki we-OCR ({providerLimitMb} MB). Ungavula isihleli esabiwe ukuze uyihlukanise ngokuzenzakalelayo ibe amafayela adaliwayo ngaphambi kokukhishwa.
single_file_heavy.case_b_message: I-PDF edalelwe ibanga elikhethiwe idlula umkhawulo womhlinzeki we-OCR ({providerLimitMb} MB). Ifayela alilayishwanga. Ungabuyela ekukhetheni amakhasi, usebenzise indlela ye-native, noma uvule isihleli esabiwe ukuze uhlukanise i-PDF ephelele.

batch_plan.failure_continue: Yeqa into ehlulekile bese uqhubeka kuleyo yunithi

ocr.activation_success: Ukuvulwa kwe-OCR kuqediwe. Kuzanywa futhi ukukhishwa.
ocr.token_state_invalid: Isimo sokungena se-Google OCR esigciniwe asivumelekile. Xhuma kabusha i-Google OCR bese uzama futhi.
ocr.activation_failed: Ukuvulwa kwe-OCR kuhlulekile. Hlola ukusethwa/ukugunyazwa bese uzama futhi.
ocr.enable_failed: Ayikwazanga ukuvula i-Google OCR. Hlola ukusethwa/ukugunyazwa bese uzama futhi.
ocr.disconnect_success: I-Google OCR inqanyuliwe. Ithokheni ye-Google egciniwe ihoxisiwe futhi isimo sokungena sendawo sisusiwe.
ocr.disconnect_not_connected: I-Google OCR ayixhunyiwe okwamanje kulesi senzakalo se-app.
ocr.disconnect_failed: Ukunqamula i-Google OCR kuhlulekile. Isimo sokungena esigciniwe asisuswanga.
ocr.connectivity_failed: I-OCR idinga uxhumano lwe-inthanethi. Hlola uxhumano lwakho bese uzama futhi.
ocr.setup_missing_credentials: I-OCR ayitholakali kule build ye-app ngoba imininingwane ye-Google OAuth efakwe ne-app ayikho.
ocr.setup_invalid_credentials: I-OCR ayitholakali kule build ye-app ngoba imininingwane ye-Google OAuth efakwe ne-app ayivumelekile.
ocr.quota_or_rate_limited: I-OCR ivinjwe okwesikhashana ngenxa yekhota/umkhawulo wezinga. Linda bese uzama futhi.
ocr.image_upload_too_large: Ifayela lesithombe elizolayishwa lidlula usayizi owamukelwa yi-Google OCR.
ocr.runtime_error: Kuvele iphutha lokusebenza le-OCR ngesikhathi sokukhishwa. Hlola ikhonsoli bese uzama futhi.
ocr.cleanup_warning: I-OCR iqediwe, kodwa ukuhlanzwa kwefayela lesikhashana elikude kuhlulekile. Hlola ifolda yakho ye-Google Drive.

batch_ocr.activation_required: Leli qoqo liqukethe izinto ze-OCR, kodwa i-Google OCR ayivuliwe. Sebenzisa Izintandokazi > Vula i-Google OCR, bese uqala iqoqo futhi.
batch_ocr.token_state_invalid: Leli qoqo liqukethe izinto ze-OCR, kodwa isimo sokungena se-Google OCR esigciniwe asivumelekile. Sebenzisa futhi Izintandokazi > Vula i-Google OCR, bese uqala iqoqo futhi.
batch_ocr.connectivity_failed: Le batch iqukethe izinto ze-OCR, kodwa i-OCR idinga uxhumano lwe-inthanethi. Hlola uxhumano lwakho bese uzama futhi ngaphambi kokuqala ukukhipha umbhalo.
batch_ocr.quota_or_rate_limited: Le batch iqukethe izinto ze-OCR, kodwa i-OCR ivinjwe okwesikhashana imikhawulo ye-quota/rate. Linda bese uzama futhi ngaphambi kokuqala ukukhipha umbhalo.
batch_ocr.unavailable: Leli qoqo liqukethe izinto ze-OCR, kodwa i-Google OCR ayitholakali manje. Uma i-OCR ingakavulwa, sebenzisa Izintandokazi > Vula i-Google OCR. Uma kungenjalo, hlola ukusethwa/ukugunyazwa kwe-OCR bese uzama futhi ngaphambi kokuqala iqoqo.

entry.title: Ukuhlolwa kwejubane lokufunda
entry.intro:
Lokhu kuhlolwa kusiza ukulinganisa ijubane lakho langempela lokufunda ngeseshini eqondisiwe. I-app izovula umbhalo bese ilinda ukuthi ucindezele u-Play (▶) eWindini Elintantayo lapho usukulungele ukuqala. Uma ukuhlolwa sekuqalile, ungacindezeli u-Pause (⏸) uze uqede ukufunda: u-Pause uqeda ukuhlolwa; awumisi isibali-sikhathi. Sebenzisa u-Stop/Reset (⏹) kuphela uma ufuna ukukhansela ukuhlolwa. Ngemva kwalokho ungabuyekeza imibuzo yokuqonda uma umbhalo uyifaka, futhi ekugcineni udale iphrezethi ngomphumela.
Ngaphambi kokuba uqale, khumbula ukuthi le mibhalo yokuhlola ivamise ukudinga imizuzu emi-5 kuya kweyi-15 yokugxila okuqhubekayo, ngaphandle kweziphazamiso.
Le pool isebenzisa imibhalo emifushane, ngakho humusha umphumela ngokuqapha. Akufanele welulwe ngqo emibhalweni emide, lapho kuvame ukungena khona izinto ezisizayo, njengokuthola ukugeleza nomongo, nezinto eziphazamisayo, njengokuphindaphinda engqondweni nokukhathala.
entry.pool_exhausted_message: Asekho amafayela okuhlola angasetshenzisiwe. Setha kabusha i-pool noma engeza amafayela amaningi.
entry.visible_empty_bundled_hidden_message: Amafayela okuhlola akhelwe ngaphakathi afihliwe okwamanje, futhi awekho amafayela okuhlola abonakalayo angakasetshenziswa asele. Wabonise futhi amafayela akhelwe ngaphakathi noma ngenisa amanye amafayela ukuze uqhubeke.
entry.start_random_confirm: Lokhu kuzobhala phezu kombhalo wamanje ngombhalo okhethwe ngokungahleliwe ofanelekile ovela ku-pool. Uyafuna ukuqhubeka?
entry.reset_confirm: Lokhu kuzosetha kabusha yonke i-pool yokuhlola futhi kumake wonke amafayela ayo njengangasetshenzisiwe futhi. Uyafuna ukuqhubeka?

tooltips.show_bundled_entries: Faka amafayela okuhlola okuqala afakwe kuhlelo lokusebenza ephulini
tooltips.get_more_files: Thola amafayela okuhlola amaningi kufolda ye-Google Drive
tooltips.start_random_text: Qala ukuhlolwa ngombhalo ongahleliwe ofanelekile ovela ku-pool

import.import_summary: Ukungenisa kuqediwe. Okungenisiwe: {imported}. Okuyizimpinda okweqiwe: {skippedDuplicates}. Ukuqinisekisa okuhlulekile: {failedValidation}. Okufakiwe efayeleni elicindezelwe okuhlulekile: {failedArchiveEntries}. Ukubhala okuhlulekile: {failedWrites}.

import_conflict.title: Ngenisa amafayela
import_conflict.message: Amanye amafayela angenisiwe asevele ekhona ku-pool. Kufanele kuphathwe kanjani izimpinda?
import_conflict.detail: {count} amagama efayela lendawo okuya kuyo asevele ekhona ku-pool.

prestart.reminder: Cindezela u-Play (▶) eWindini Elintantayo lapho usukulungele ukuqala. Uma ukuhlolwa sekuqalile, ungacindezeli u-Pause (⏸) uze uqede ukufunda: u-Pause uqeda ukuhlolwa; awumisi isibali-sikhathi. Cindezela u-Stop/Reset (⏹) kuphela uma ufuna ukukhansela ukuhlolwa.

questions.title: Imibuzo yokuqonda okufundiwe
questions.intro: Ukuphendula le mibuzo yokuqonda okufundiwe kuyazikhethela futhi akuthinti umphumela wakho wokugcina. Kusetshenziswa kuphela ukukusiza uhlaziye ubunzima bombhalo nokuthi ijubane nesitayela sakho sokufunda sikuvumele yini ukufinyelela ezingeni eliyisisekelo lokuqonda. Izimpendulo zakho azigcinwa futhi azithunyelwa kubathuthukisi noma komunye umuntu.
questions.incomplete_warning: Kufanele uphendule yonke imibuzo ngaphambi kokuhlola.
questions.chance_at_least_observed: Amathuba okuthola okungenani lo mphumela ngokuphendula ngokuqagela: {percentage}

alerts.precondition_blocked: Ukuhlolwa kwejubane lokufunda kungaqalwa kuphela lapho i-app isesimweni esizinzile. Vala amawindi esibili futhi uqinisekise ukuthi isibali-sikhathi simisiwe.
